title: Plant Commission Goal Payload
description: Structured contract for an ordinary build goal dedicated to later-plant commissioning. When executed through the helper, the commissioning run creates the plant from a seed and queues its first bounded goal with an automatic dependency on the commissioning goal.

plant_name.description: Name of the later plant to commission.

seed.description: Seed name to materialize for the later plant.

type.description: Type for the first bounded goal queued for the new plant.

body.description: Human-readable body for the first bounded goal.

priority.description: Optional priority override for the first bounded goal.

driver.description: Optional driver override for the first bounded goal.

model.description: Optional model override for the first bounded goal.

reasoning_effort.description: Optional reasoning effort override for the first bounded goal.
